commandsRun.observation: Collected all referenced tx receipts/logs plus historical and latest eth_call snapshots into lending-smokes-a-live-evidence.json.

commandsRun.command: cd "/home/kpa/polkadot/dualvm" && node <<'NODE' ... provider.send('eth_call', [{to,data}, '0x62f1cd']) vs latest ... NODE
commandsRun.observation: Confirmed reliable historical reads require raw eth_call with hex block tags: currentDebt at block 0x62f1cd returned 150.000002663622526636 versus 4007.1711146382706190393 at latest.

steps.expected: USDC transfers into the vault and ERC-4626 Deposit emits assets/shares
steps.observed: Receipt shows 1000 USDC transferred to DebtPool and Deposit emitted assets=1000, shares=1000.

steps.action: Read DebtPool balanceOf(lp), totalAssets(), and USDC balanceOf(pool) at the deposit block via historical eth_call
steps.expected: LP share balance and vault assets equal the deposit amount
steps.observed: Historical reads returned shareBalance=1000.0, totalAssets=1000.0, poolUsdc=1000.0.

steps.action: Read availableLiquidity() and maxWithdraw(lp) at the deposit block tied to 0x800fee1ee0ba57bb53b286f03ed4b7b0669fb48a666382eccdcfa9f713615d6e
steps.expected: Both values match the 1000 USDC liquidity available immediately after the LP seed
steps.observed: Historical reads returned availableLiquidity=1000.0 and maxWithdraw=1000.0.

steps.action: Simulate withdraw(availableLiquidity + 1) with eth_call from the LP address
steps.observed: eth_call reverted with InsufficientLiquidity requested=1000000000000000000001 available=1000000000000000000000.

steps.expected: Transaction value and Wrapped event amount match 1:1
steps.observed: Receipt value=2.0 PAS and Wrapped emitted amount=2000000000000000000.

steps.action: Read WPAS balanceOf(borrower) at the wrap block via historical eth_call
steps.expected: Borrower holds newly minted WPAS equal to the wrapped PAS amount
steps.observed: Historical read returned borrower WPAS balance=2.0.

steps.expected: WPAS transfers to LendingCore and CollateralDeposited emits the deposit amount
steps.observed: Receipt shows 2 WPAS transferred into LendingCore and CollateralDeposited emitted amount=2e18.

steps.action: Read LendingCore.positions(borrower) at the deposit block via historical eth_call
steps.expected: collateralAmount increases while debt remains zero before borrowing
steps.observed: Historical position shows collateralAmount=2.0, principalDebt=0.0, accruedInterest=0.0.

steps.expected: Borrowed event emits and USDC transfers from DebtPool to the borrower
steps.observed: Receipt shows Borrowed(account, amount=100e18, borrowRateBps=300) and a 100 USDC transfer from DebtPool to the borrower.

steps.action: Read currentDebt(borrower), USDC balanceOf(borrower), and DebtPool.outstandingPrincipal() at the borrow block
steps.expected: All three values reflect the 100 USDC borrow
steps.observed: Historical reads returned currentDebt=100.0, borrowerUsdc=100.0, outstandingPrincipal=100.0.

steps.expected: Repaid event shows payment split between interest and principal

steps.action: Read currentDebt(borrower) and reserveBalance() at the repay block
steps.expected: Debt falls and reserve balance increases after the repayment
steps.observed: Historical reads at the repay block returned debtAfter=150.000002663622526636 and reserveBalanceAfter=0.000000266362252663; reserveBalanceBefore was 0.0.

steps.action: Cross-check the canonical results artifact for the pre-repay debt snapshot
steps.expected: Artifact pre/post debt values align with the on-chain Repaid event and historical after-state
steps.observed: Artifact recorded debtBefore=200.000002663622526636 USDC and debtAfter=150.000002663622526636 USDC, matching the event split and historical after-state.

assertions.title: Liquidation clears underwater position

steps.expected: Liquidation both reduces debt and clears the underwater position claimed by the canonical artifact/title

steps.action: Read currentDebt(borrower), positions(borrower), and liquidator WPAS balance at the liquidation block
steps.expected: Borrower position is cleared if the assertion/artifact claim is true
steps.observed: Historical reads show debtBefore=5150.000021933029261506, debtAfter=4007.143823242557092086, borrower collateral remaining=0.000000000000000001, and liquidator WPAS increased from 0.0 to 11.999999999999999999.

steps.action: Compare on-chain post-state to the canonical results artifact text
steps.expected: Artifact text and on-chain state agree
steps.observed: Artifact says 'Liquidation executed successfully — borrower position cleared', but the historical on-chain state still shows a live debt of 4007.143823242557092086 and residual collateral of 0.000000000000000001.

evidence.artifact: Liquidation executed successfully — borrower position cleared

assertions.issues: Contradictory evidence: the liquidation reduced debt and transferred collateral, but it did not clear the borrower position as the assertion title/canonical artifact claim implies.

assertions.title: Bad debt cleared on full collateral seizure

steps.action: Inspect liquidation receipt 0xeec68ce067523113520a888e9344860ea9d9421c135a6db6823da56ebe12048b for bad-debt markers
steps.expected: BadDebtRealized emits and Liquidated.badDebtWrittenOff is non-zero when collateral is exhausted but debt remains
steps.observed: Liquidated.badDebtWrittenOff=0 and no BadDebtRealized events were emitted.

steps.action: Read currentDebt(borrower) and positions(borrower) at the liquidation block
steps.expected: currentDebt becomes 0 and the borrower position is cleared

assertions.issues: Assertion not met: the referenced liquidation neither emitted BadDebtRealized nor reduced currentDebt to zero, so bad debt was not cleared on full collateral seizure.

frictions.description: ethers provider.call with numeric block tags produced misleading historical reads on this RPC surface during initial validation.
frictions.resolution: Switched to raw provider.send('eth_call', ..., hexBlockTag) inside the evidence script and verified the historical-vs-latest difference explicitly.
